messages.content: You are an expert Remotion video developer. Generate production-quality TypeScript React components for a 45-second product demo video about Correctover (verified AI failover SDK). Use Remotion v4 API. Color scheme: cyan (#00E5FF), indigo (#6366F1), dark bg (#0A0A1A), white text. Duration: 30fps x 45s = 1350 frames.

Create 4 TypeScript React components for a Remotion product demo. Use Remotion v4 API: useCurrentFrame(), interpolate(), spring(), Sequence, AbsoluteFill, useVideoConfig. Use inline styles. Font: system sans-serif. 1920x1080, 30fps, 1350 frames total. Color: dark bg #0A0A1A, cyan #00E5FF, indigo #6366F1, white #FFFFFF.

SCENE 1 (0-360 frames, 12s): 'Your AI Failover is Broken'
- Dark background with subtle grid lines
- Large 'HTTP 200 OK' in green that looks deceptively safe
- 4 failure modes animate in sequentially with red alerts: Silent Model Substitution, Semantic Drift, Cost Explosion, Content Degradation
- Each failure mode slides in with a warning icon and red highlight
- End with 'But HTTP 200 Cannot Catch These' in yellow/amber

SCENE 2 (360-840 frames, 16s): 'Correctover: Verified Failover'
- Gradient title 'Verified Failover' (cyan to indigo)
- 6 dimension boxes animating in with checkmarks: Schema Validation, Semantic Equivalence, Latency Compliance, Cost Guardrails, Content Integrity, Identity Verification
- Benchmark counter: 'Diagnosis: P50 22us P99 47us'
- 'pip install correctover' code display

SCENE 3 (840-1080 frames, 8s): 'How It Works'
- Architecture flow: Your App -> SDK(in-process) -> Provider A / Provider B / Provider C
- Badges: Zero Network Overhead, No Proxy, Open Source
- Verification shield icon appears before failover arrow

SCENE 4 (1080-1350 frames, 9s): 'Build Reliable AI'
- Large 'correctover.com' url
- 'Verified Failover for LLM Applications' subtitle
- 'pip install correctover' CTA button with gradient
- Fade out ending

Output EACH file with a comment at top like: // === Scene1.tsx ===
